summary:
The Avalanche is open 🌍 and the man who organised the whole thing has already conceded a goal. Zach's South Africa were well beaten by a comfortable Mexico side and he's officially on the Wooden Spoon board on Day 1. Poetic, really.

Carole on the other hand is quietly delighted — Mexico were solid, professional, and exactly what you want from a Tier 1 team. Three points on the board and the tournament hasn't even warmed up yet 😏

For everyone else, today was a spectator sport. But don't get too comfortable — 103 games to go and the Avalanche doesn't care about your feelings.

Early leaderboard verdict: Carole 1 — 0 Zach. The organisational irony is not lost on anyone. ⚽
